datasets.name: 关键指标汇总（区块一）
datasets.sql_template: WITH Ordered AS ( SELECT RECCODE, RECFLOCODE, RECFROMSTATUS, CREATEDBY, RECFLONODE AS OldNode, LASTSAVED, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY LASTSAVED, RECCODE) AS NewNode FROM ATWORKFLOWRECORDS ), ProcessTime AS ( SELECT RECCODE, RECFLOCODE, RECFROMSTATUS, CREATEDBY, NewNode, LASTSAVED AS ApprovalTime, LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) AS CreateTime, CASE WHEN LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(HOUR, LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode), LASTSAVED) ELSE NULL END AS ProcessHours, CASE WHEN LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode), LASTSAVED) / 1440.0, 2) ELSE NULL END AS ProcessDays FROM Ordered ), data_all AS ( SELECT RECCODE, RECFLOCODE, CREATEDBY, CreateTime, ApprovalTime, ProcessHours, ProcessDays FROM ProcessTime WHERE CreateTime IS NOT NULL AND ProcessDays > 0 ) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT da.RECCODE + '|' + da.RECFLOCODE) AS 工单数量, ROUND(SUM(da.ProcessDays), 3) AS 总耗时, ROUND(AVG(da.ProcessDays), 3) AS 平均耗时, COUNT(DISTINCT da.CREATEDBY) AS 处理人数, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT da.RECCODE + '|' + da.RECFLOCODE) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT da.CREATEDBY), 0), 3) AS 人均工单, CASE WHEN AVG(da.ProcessDays) <= 0.125 THEN '极速处理' WHEN AVG(da.ProcessDays) <= 1 THEN '快速处理' WHEN AVG(da.ProcessDays) <= 5 THEN '正常处理' WHEN AVG(da.ProcessDays) <= 10 THEN '较慢处理' WHEN AVG(da.ProcessDays) <= 30 THEN '滞后处理' WHEN AVG(da.ProcessDays) <= 90 THEN '严重滞后' WHEN AVG(da.ProcessDays) > 90 THEN '超长滞留' ELSE '未知' END AS 效能区间 FROM data_all da LEFT JOIN ATUSERS au ON da.CREATEDBY = au.USRCODE LEFT JOIN ATWORKFLOW af ON da.RECFLOCODE = af.FLOCODE WHERE au.USRDESC IS NOT NULL -- 部门筛选  -- 流程类型筛选  -- 时间范围筛选（基于节点审批时间）

datasets.name: 各部门工单处理情况（区块二）
datasets.sql_template:
-- 参数：${flow_type} - 工单子类, ${dept} - 部门, ${start_time} - 开始时间, ${end_time} - 结束时间
WITH Ordered AS ( 
    SELECT 
        WR.RECCODE, 
        WR.RECFLOCODE, 
        WR.CREATEDBY, 
        WR.LASTSAVED, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY WR.RECCODE, WR.RECFLOCODE ORDER BY WR.LASTSAVED, WR.RECCODE) AS NewNode 
    FROM ATWORKFLOWRECORDS WR 
    LEFT JOIN ATWORKFLOW AF ON WR.RECFLOCODE = AF.FLOCODE 
where 1=1 ${if(len(flow_type)>0," and AF.FLODESC in ('"+SUBSTITUTE(flow_type,",","','")+"') " ,"")}     
), 
ProcessTime AS ( 
    SELECT 
        RECCODE, 
        RECFLOCODE, 
        CREATEDBY, 
        LASTSAVED AS ApprovalTime,
        LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) AS CreateTime, 
        CASE 
            WHEN LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) IS NOT NULL 
            THEN ROUND(CAST(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 
                 LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode), 
                 LASTSAVED) AS FLOAT) / 1440.0, 2) 
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS ProcessDays 
    FROM Ordered 
), 
data_all AS (
    SELECT 
        RECCODE,
        RECFLOCODE,
        CREATEDBY,
        ApprovalTime,
        CreateTime,
        ProcessDays
    FROM ProcessTime 
    WHERE CreateTime IS NOT NULL 
      AND ProcessDays > 0  -- 添加此条件
)
SELECT 
    AU.USRMRC as dept_code, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT da.RECCODE + '|' + da.RECFLOCODE) as order_count, 
    ROUND(SUM(da.ProcessDays), 3) as total_process_days, 
    ROUND(AVG(da.ProcessDays), 3) as avg_process_days, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT da.CREATEDBY) as user_count 
FROM data_all da 
LEFT JOIN ATUSERS AU ON da.CREATEDBY = AU.USRCODE 
LEFT JOIN ATWORKFLOW AF ON da.RECFLOCODE = AF.FLOCODE
WHERE AU.USRDESC IS NOT NULL  -- 添加此条件
  AND AU.USRMRC IS NOT NULL 
  AND AU.USRMRC <> '*'
  -- 部门筛选
  --${if(len(dept)>0," AND AU.USRMRC IN ('"+SUBSTITUTE(dept,",","','")+"') " ,"")}
  -- 时间范围筛选
  ${if(len(start_time)==0,if(len(end_time)==0,"","AND da.ApprovalTime <= '"+end_time+"'"),if(len(end_time)==0,"AND da.ApprovalTime >= '"+start_time+"'","AND da.ApprovalTime BETWEEN '"+start_time+ "' AND '"+end_time+"'"))}
GROUP BY AU.USRMRC 
ORDER BY avg_process_days ASC

datasets.name: 处理时长分布图（区块三）
datasets.sql_template:
WITH Ordered AS (
    SELECT
        RECCODE,
        RECFLOCODE,
        RECFROMSTATUS,
        CREATEDBY,
        RECFLONODE AS OldNode,
        LASTSAVED,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY LASTSAVED, RECCODE) AS NewNode
    FROM ATWORKFLOWRECORDS
),
ProcessTime AS (
    SELECT
        RECCODE,
        RECFLOCODE,
        RECFROMSTATUS,
        CREATEDBY,
        NewNode,
        LASTSAVED AS ApprovalTime,
        LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) AS CreateTime,
        -- 计算处理时长（小时）
        CASE
            WHEN LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) IS NOT NULL
            THEN DATEDIFF(HOUR,
                 LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode),
                 LASTSAVED)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS ProcessHours,
        -- 计算处理时长（天，保留2位小数，与区块四完全一致）
        CASE
            WHEN LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) IS NOT NULL
            THEN ROUND(DATEDIFF(MINUTE,
                 LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode),
                 LASTSAVED) / 1440.0, 2)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS ProcessDays
    FROM Ordered
),
data_all AS (
    SELECT 
        RECCODE,
        RECFLOCODE,
        RECFROMSTATUS,
        CREATEDBY,
        NewNode,
        CreateTime,
        ApprovalTime,
        ProcessHours,
        ProcessDays,
        -- 处理时长分类（中文描述）
        CASE
            WHEN ProcessHours <= 3 THEN '3小时内'
            WHEN ProcessDays <= 1 THEN '3小时到1天'
            WHEN ProcessDays <= 5 THEN '1天到5天'
            WHEN ProcessDays <= 10 THEN '5天到10天'
            WHEN ProcessDays <= 30 THEN '10天到30天'
            WHEN ProcessDays <= 90 THEN '30天到90天'
            WHEN ProcessDays > 90 THEN '大于90天'
            ELSE '未分类'
        END AS ProcessTimeCategory,
        -- 处理时长区间标识（简版，用于图表）
        CASE
            WHEN ProcessHours <= 3 THEN '≤3h'
            WHEN ProcessDays <= 1 THEN '3h-1d'
            WHEN ProcessDays <= 5 THEN '1-5d'
            WHEN ProcessDays <= 10 THEN '5-10d'
            WHEN ProcessDays <= 30 THEN '10-30d'
            WHEN ProcessDays <= 90 THEN '30-90d'
            ELSE '>90d'
        END AS TimeRangeLabel
    FROM ProcessTime
    WHERE CreateTime IS NOT NULL
      AND ProcessDays > 0
)
SELECT 
    da.TimeRangeLabel AS 时间区间,
    COUNT(0) AS 节点数量
FROM data_all da
LEFT JOIN ATWORKFLOW af ON da.RECFLOCODE = af.FLOCODE
LEFT JOIN ATUSERS au ON da.CREATEDBY = au.USRCODE
WHERE au.USRDESC IS NOT NULL
  AND da.ProcessDays > 0
  -- 部门筛选（与区块四完全一致）
  ${if(len(dept)>0," AND au.USRMRC IN ('"+SUBSTITUTE(dept,",","','")+"') " ,"")}
  -- 流程类型筛选
  ${if(len(flow_type)>0," AND af.FLODESC IN ('"+SUBSTITUTE(flow_type,",","','")+"') " ,"")}
  -- 时间范围筛选
  ${if(len(start_time)==0,if(len(end_time)==0,"","AND da.ApprovalTime <= '"+end_time+"'"),if(len(end_time)==0,"AND da.ApprovalTime >= '"+start_time+"'","AND da.ApprovalTime BETWEEN '"+start_time+ "' AND '"+end_time+"'"))}
GROUP BY da.TimeRangeLabel
ORDER BY 
    CASE da.TimeRangeLabel
        WHEN '≤3h' THEN 1
        WHEN '3h-1d' THEN 2
        WHEN '1-5d' THEN 3
        WHEN '5-10d' THEN 4
        WHEN '10-30d' THEN 5
        WHEN '30-90d' THEN 6
        WHEN '>90d' THEN 7
        ELSE 8
    END

datasets.name: 工单数量统计（区块三）
datasets.sql_template:
WITH Ordered AS (
    SELECT
        RECCODE,
        RECFLOCODE,
        RECFROMSTATUS,
        CREATEDBY,
        RECFLONODE AS OldNode,
        LASTSAVED,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY LASTSAVED, RECCODE) AS NewNode
    FROM ATWORKFLOWRECORDS
),
ProcessTime AS (
    SELECT
        RECCODE,
        RECFLOCODE,
        RECFROMSTATUS,
        CREATEDBY,
        NewNode,
        LASTSAVED AS ApprovalTime,
        LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) AS CreateTime,
        CASE
            WHEN LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) IS NOT NULL
            THEN DATEDIFF(HOUR,
                 LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode),
                 LASTSAVED)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS ProcessHours,
        CASE
            WHEN LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) IS NOT NULL
            THEN ROUND(DATEDIFF(MINUTE,
                 LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE, RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode),
                 LASTSAVED) / 1440.0, 2)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS ProcessDays
    FROM Ordered
),
data_all AS (
    SELECT 
        RECCODE,
        RECFLOCODE,
        CREATEDBY,
        CreateTime,
        ApprovalTime,
        ProcessHours,
        ProcessDays
    FROM ProcessTime
    WHERE CreateTime IS NOT NULL
      AND ProcessDays > 0
),
-- 获取每个工单的工单大类（去重）
workflow_entity AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        da.RECCODE,
        da.RECFLOCODE,
        af.FLOENTITYDESC AS 工单大类
    FROM data_all da
    LEFT JOIN ATWORKFLOW af ON da.RECFLOCODE = af.FLOCODE
    LEFT JOIN ATUSERS au ON da.CREATEDBY = au.USRCODE
    WHERE au.USRDESC IS NOT NULL
      -- 部门筛选
      ${if(len(dept)>0," AND au.USRMRC IN ('"+SUBSTITUTE(dept,",","','")+"') " ,"")}
      -- 流程类型筛选（若需要，取消注释即可）
      -- ${if(len(flow_type)>0," AND af.FLODESC IN ('"+SUBSTITUTE(flow_type,",","','")+"') " ,"")}
      -- 时间范围筛选
      ${if(len(start_time)==0,if(len(end_time)==0,"","AND da.ApprovalTime <= '"+end_time+"'"),if(len(end_time)==0,"AND da.ApprovalTime >= '"+start_time+"'","AND da.ApprovalTime BETWEEN '"+start_time+ "' AND '"+end_time+"'"))}
)
SELECT
    工单大类,
    COUNT(DISTINCT RECCODE + '|' + RECFLOCODE) AS 工单数量
FROM workflow_entity
GROUP BY 工单大类
ORDER BY 工单数量 DESC

datasets.name: 部门人均效能（区块四）
datasets.sql_template:
WITH Ordered AS (
    SELECT
        af.RECCODE,
        af.RECFLOCODE,
        aw.noddesc as RECFROMSTATUS,
        af.CREATEDBY,
        af.RECFLONODE AS OldNode,
        af.LASTSAVED,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY af.RECCODE,af.RECFLOCODE ORDER BY af.LASTSAVED, af.RECCODE) AS NewNode
    FROM ATWORKFLOWRECORDS af left join ATWORKFLOWNODES aw on af.RECFLOCODE = aw.NODCODE and af.RECFROMSTATUS = aw.NODEAMSTATUS
),
ProcessTime AS (
    SELECT
        RECCODE,
        RECFLOCODE,
        RECFROMSTATUS,
        CREATEDBY,
        NewNode,
        LASTSAVED AS ApprovalTime,
        LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE,RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) AS CreateTime,
        -- 计算处理时长（小时）
        CASE
            WHEN LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE,RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) IS NOT NULL
            THEN DATEDIFF(HOUR,
                 LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE,RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode),
                 LASTSAVED)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS ProcessHours,
        -- 计算处理时长（天，保留2位小数）
        CASE
            WHEN LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE,RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode) IS NOT NULL
            THEN ROUND(DATEDIFF(MINUTE,
                 LAG(LASTSAVED) OVER (PARTITION BY RECCODE,RECFLOCODE ORDER BY NewNode),
                 LASTSAVED) / 1440.0, 2)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS ProcessDays
    FROM Ordered
),
data_all as (SELECT RECCODE,       -- 流程编码
                    RECFLOCODE,    -- 流程类型
                    RECFROMSTATUS, -- 起始状态
                    CREATEDBY,     -- 操作人
                    NewNode,       -- 节点序号
                    CreateTime,    -- 节点开始时间
                    ApprovalTime,  -- 节点结束时间（批准时间）
                    ProcessHours,  -- 处理时长（小时）
                    ProcessDays,   -- 处理时长（天）

                    -- 处理时长分类（按新规则）
                    CASE
                        WHEN ProcessHours <= 72 THEN '3小时内' -- ≤3小时
                        WHEN ProcessDays <= 1 THEN '3小时到1天' -- 3小时~1天(24小时)
                        WHEN ProcessDays <= 5 THEN '1天到5天' -- 1~5天
                        WHEN ProcessDays <= 10 THEN '5天到10天' -- 5~10天
                        WHEN ProcessDays <= 30 THEN '10天到30天' -- 10~30天
                        WHEN ProcessDays <= 90 THEN '30天到90天' -- 30~90天
                        WHEN ProcessDays > 90 THEN '大于90天' -- >90天
                        ELSE '未分类'
                        END AS ProcessTimeCategory,

                    -- 是否超时（假设SLA为3天）
                    CASE
                        WHEN ProcessDays > 3 THEN 1
                        ELSE 0
                        END AS IsSLAExceeded,

                    -- 处理时长区间标识（简版，用于图表）
                    CASE
                        WHEN ProcessHours <= 72 THEN '≤3h'
                        WHEN ProcessDays <= 1 THEN '3h-1d'
                        WHEN ProcessDays <= 5 THEN '1-5d'
                        WHEN ProcessDays <= 10 THEN '5-10d'
                        WHEN ProcessDays <= 30 THEN '10-30d'
                        WHEN ProcessDays <= 90 THEN '30-90d'
                        ELSE '>90d'
                        END AS TimeRangeLabel

             FROM ProcessTime
             WHERE CreateTime IS NOT NULL
             AND ProcessDays > 0  -- 过滤首节点（无开始时间）
             )
select AU.USRDESC,RECFROMSTATUS,sum(DA.ProcessDays) as 总耗时,avg(DA.ProcessDays) as 平均耗时,count(0) as 审批数量 from data_all da
    left join ATWORKFLOW AF on DA.RECFLOCODE = AF.FLOCODE LEFT JOIN ATUSERS AU ON DA.CREATEDBY = AU.USRCODE WHERE USRDESC IS NOT NULL AND ProcessDays > 0
${if(len(dept)>0," and au.USRMRC in ('"+SUBSTITUTE(dept,",","','")+"') " ,"")}  
${if(len(RECFROMSTATUS)>0," and RECFROMSTATUS in ('"+SUBSTITUTE(RECFROMSTATUS,",","','")+"') " ,"")}  
${if(len(flow_type)>0," and AF.FLODESC in ('"+SUBSTITUTE(flow_type,",","','")+"') " ,"")}                  
  ${if(len(start_time)==0,if(len(end_time)==0,"","and da.ApprovalTime <= '"+end_time+"'" ),if(len(end_time)==0,"and da.ApprovalTime >= '"+start_time+"'","and da.ApprovalTime between '"+start_time+ "' and '"+end_time+"'"))}              
 GROUP BY AU.USRDESC,RECFROMSTATUS
 order by count(0) desc

datasets.name: 工单完成情况
datasets.sql_template:
WITH workflow_status AS (
    SELECT
        af.wfscode,              -- 工单唯一标识，输出列名 wfscode
        af.WFSFLOCODE,            -- 流程代码
        af.WFSSTATUS,
        at.FLODESC AS 流程类型,
        af.LASTSAVED,
        CASE 
            WHEN RIGHT(af.WFSSTATUS, 2) = 'WC' THEN '已完成'
            ELSE '未完成'
        END AS 完成状态
    FROM ATWORKFLOWSTATUS af
    LEFT JOIN ATWORKFLOWNODES aw
        ON af.WFSFLOCODE = aw.NODCODE
        AND af.WFSSTATUS = aw.NODEAMSTATUS
    LEFT JOIN ATWORKFLOW at
        ON at.FLOCODE = af.WFSFLOCODE
        AND at.FLOCODE = aw.NODCODE
    WHERE aw.noddesc NOT LIKE N'%取消%'
      AND af.WFSSTATUS IS NOT NULL
      AND at.FLODESC IS NOT NULL
      ${if(len(start_time)==0,if(len(end_time)==0,"","AND af.LASTSAVED <= '"+end_time+"'"),if(len(end_time)==0,"AND af.LASTSAVED >= '"+start_time+"'","AND af.LASTSAVED BETWEEN '"+start_time+ "' AND '"+end_time+"'"))}
)
SELECT
    LEFT(流程类型, 7) AS 流程类型,
    完成状态,
    COUNT(DISTINCT wfscode + '|' + WFSFLOCODE) AS 工单数量   -- 直接使用列名，不加表别名
FROM workflow_status
WHERE 1=1
    ${if(len(flow_type)>0," AND 流程类型 IN ('"+SUBSTITUTE(flow_type,",","','")+"') " ,"")}
GROUP BY 流程类型, 完成状态
ORDER BY 流程类型, 完成状态

datasets.name: 呆滞物料明细
datasets.sql_template:
/*仓库呆滞物料物资数据占比统计（单位：%）统计180天内未执行过出库操作的自编批号SKU（同自编批号去重），并根据产品组的分类信息，进行占比统计，不包含研发区；只统计合格状态；需做超链接跳转，物料：原料、包材、辅料；*/
select * from (
SELECT CASE WHEN bs.sku_group5 IN ( 'C类物资', 'B类物资' ) THEN
              'B、C类物资'
         WHEN bs.sku_group5 IN ( '包材', '原料', '辅料' ) THEN
           '物料'
         ELSE
           bs.sku_group5
       END 类型,bs.skudescr1,SUM(illi.qty) as sum_qty,ila.lotAtt06,bs.alternate_sku3,t.uomDescr
  FROM dbo.INV_LOT_LOC_ID illi WITH (NOLOCK)
  LEFT JOIN
       dbo.INV_LOT_ATT ila
    ON ila.organizationId = illi.organizationId
   AND ila.lotNum         = illi.lotNum
  LEFT JOIN
       dbo.BAS_SKU bs WITH (NOLOCK)
    ON bs.organizationId   = illi.organizationId
   AND bs.customerId       = illi.customerId
   AND bs.sku              = illi.sku
  LEFT JOIN
       dbo.BAS_LOCATION bl WITH (NOLOCK)
    ON bl.organizationId   = illi.organizationId
   AND bl.warehouseId      = illi.warehouseId
   AND bl.locationId       = illi.locationId
  LEFT JOIN
       ( SELECT atl.organizationId, atl.warehouseId, ila1.lotAtt06
           FROM dbo.ACT_TRANSACTION_LOG atl WITH (NOLOCK)
           LEFT JOIN
                dbo.INV_LOT_ATT ila1 WITH (NOLOCK)
             ON ila1.organizationId = atl.organizationId
            AND ila1.lotNum         = atl.toLotNum
          WHERE atl.status          = '99'
            AND atl.transactionType IN ( 'IN', 'SO' )

			AND atl.transactionTime > DATEADD(DAY, -180, GETDATE())
			) atl
    ON atl.organizationId = ila.organizationId
   AND atl.warehouseId    = illi.warehouseId
   AND atl.lotAtt06       = ila.lotAtt06
	 LEFT JOIN BAS_SKU_MULTIWAREHOUSE bsm WITH(NOLOCK)    
      ON    
      ila.organizationId = bsm.organizationId    
      AND illi.warehouseId = bsm.warehouseId    
      AND ila.customerId = bsm.customerId    
      AND bs.sku = bsm.sku    
      LEFT JOIN BAS_PACKAGE_DETAILS t WITH(NOLOCK)    
      ON    
      ila.organizationId = t.organizationId    
      AND    
      CASE WHEN isnull(bsm.customerId, '') = '' THEN bs.customerId ELSE    
      bsm.customerId END = t.customerId    
      AND    
      CASE WHEN isnull(bsm.packId, '') = '' THEN bs.packId ELSE bsm.packId END =    
      t.packId    
      AND    
      CASE WHEN isnull(bsm.reportUom, '') = '' THEN bs.reportUom ELSE    
      bsm.reportUom END = t.packUom
  /* AND atl.transactionTime > DATEADD(DAY, -180, '2025-04-01')*/
 WHERE bs.sku_group5 IN ( 'C类物资', 'B类物资', '包材', '原料', '辅料', 'A类物资' )
   AND atl.organizationId IS NULL
   AND bl.zoneid =  '02'
	 GROUP BY CASE WHEN bs.sku_group5 IN ( 'C类物资', 'B类物资' ) THEN
              'B、C类物资'
         WHEN bs.sku_group5 IN ( '包材', '原料', '辅料' ) THEN
           '物料'
         ELSE
           bs.sku_group5
       END ,bs.skudescr1,ila.lotAtt06,bs.alternate_sku3,t.uomDescr
	) t where t.类型 is not null ${if(len(物资物料类型)=0,"","and t.类型 = '"+物资物料类型+"'")}  order by right(t.lotAtt06,6) asc

ds3
datasets.sql_template:
SELECT
bas_sku.easycode,




CASE WHEN SUM(a.qty /
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) != 0 THEN t.qty          ELSE 1 END) - SUM(a.qtyAllocated /
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) != 0 THEN t.qty          ELSE 1 END) - SUM(a.qtyOnHold /
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) != 0 THEN t.qty          ELSE 1 END) - SUM(a.qtyRpOut /
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) != 0 THEN t.qty          ELSE 1 END) - SUM(a.qtyMvOut /
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) != 0 THEN t.qty          ELSE 1 END) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) = 0  THEN a.qty          ELSE a.qty /(
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) != 0 THEN t.qty          ELSE 1 END) END) - SUM(
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) = 0  THEN a.qtyAllocated ELSE a.qtyAllocated /(
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) != 0 THEN t.qty          ELSE 1 END) END) - SUM(
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) = 0  THEN a.qtyOnHold    ELSE a.qtyOnHold /(
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) != 0 THEN t.qty          ELSE 1 END) END) - SUM(
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) = 0  THEN a.qtyRpOut     ELSE a.qtyRpOut /(
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) != 0 THEN t.qty          ELSE 1 END) END) - SUM(
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) = 0  THEN a.qtyMvOut     ELSE a.qtyMvOut /(
CASE WHEN isnull(t.qty, 0) != 0 THEN t.qty          ELSE 1 END) END) END AS
qtyAvailed
FROM
INV_LOT_LOC_ID a WITH(NOLOCK)
LEFT JOIN BAS_SKU bas_sku WITH(NOLOCK)
ON
a.organizationId = bas_sku.organizationId
AND bas_sku.customerId = a.customerId
AND bas_sku.sku = a.sku
LEFT JOIN BAS_CUSTOMER b WITH(NOLOCK)
ON
a.organizationId = b.organizationId
AND a.customerId = b.customerId
AND b.customerType = 'OW'
LEFT JOIN BAS_SKU_MULTIWAREHOUSE bsm WITH(NOLOCK)
ON
a.organizationId = bsm.organizationId
AND a.warehouseId = bsm.warehouseId
AND a.customerId = bsm.customerId
AND a.sku = bsm.sku
LEFT JOIN BAS_PACKAGE_DETAILS t WITH(NOLOCK)
ON
bas_sku.organizationId = t.organizationId
AND
CASE WHEN isnull(bsm.customerId, '') = '' THEN bas_sku.customerId ELSE
bsm.customerId END = t.customerId
AND
CASE WHEN isnull(bsm.packId, '') = '' THEN bas_sku.packId ELSE bsm.packId END =
t.packId
AND
CASE WHEN isnull(bsm.reportUom, '') = '' THEN bas_sku.reportUom ELSE
bsm.reportUom END = t.packUom
LEFT JOIN BAS_LOCATION d WITH(NOLOCK)
ON
a.organizationId = d.organizationId
AND a.warehouseId = d.warehouseId
AND a.locationId = d.locationId
LEFT JOIN BAS_ZONE h WITH(NOLOCK)
ON
a.organizationId = h.organizationId
AND a.warehouseId = h.warehouseId
AND d.zoneId = h.zoneId
LEFT JOIN INV_LOT_ATT ila WITH(NOLOCK)
ON
a.organizationId = ila.organizationId
AND a.lotNum = ila.lotNum
LEFT JOIN BSM_CODE_ML m
ON
1 = 1
AND a.organizationId = m.organizationId
AND m.codeType = 'ENVIRONMENT_TYPE'
AND m.codeId = bas_sku.environment
WHERE
a.organizationId = 'ZXJT'
AND
(
a.qty > 0
OR a.qtyRpIn > 0
OR a.qtyMvIn > 0
)
AND a.warehouseId IN('ZXJT')
and bas_sku.easycode = '${物料代码}'
GROUP BY
a.organizationId,
a.warehouseId,
a.customerId,
a.sku,
bas_sku.easycode,
bas_sku.skuDescr1,
bas_sku.skuDescr2,
t.uomDescr,
t.qty,
BAS_SKU.organizationId,
BAS_SKU.packId,
BAS_SKU.customerId,
bas_sku.alternate_sku4,
bas_sku.alternate_sku5,
bas_sku.environment,
bas_sku.alternate_sku3,
m.codeDescr

datasets.name: 近效期数据
datasets.sql_template:
/*仓库近效期物料物资数据占比统计 根据左边表1的统计总数，按产品档案SKU类型进行占比划分*/
 SELECT CASE WHEN BS.sku_group5 IN ( 'C类物资', 'B类物资' ) THEN
                                          'B、C类物资'
                                     WHEN BS.sku_group5 IN ( '包材', '原料', '辅料' ) THEN
                                       '物料'
                                     ELSE
                                       BS.sku_group5
                                   END AS 类型, isnull(ILA.lotAtt02, ILA.lotatt07) AS 近效期,ila.lotAtt06,bs.alternate_sku3,bs.skuDescr1,t.uomDescr,sum(illi.qty) as sum_qty
           FROM dbo.INV_LOT_LOC_ID ILLI WITH (NOLOCK)
           LEFT JOIN
                dbo.BAS_LOCATION BL WITH (NOLOCK)
             ON BL.organizationId  = ILLI.organizationId
            AND BL.warehouseId     = ILLI.warehouseId
            AND BL.locationId      = ILLI.locationId
           LEFT JOIN
                dbo.BAS_SKU BS WITH (NOLOCK)
             ON BS.organizationId  = ILLI.organizationId
            AND BS.customerId      = ILLI.customerId
            AND BS.sku             = ILLI.sku
						
           LEFT JOIN
                dbo.INV_LOT_ATT ILA WITH (NOLOCK)
             ON ILA.organizationId = ILLI.organizationId
            AND ILA.lotNum         = ILLI.lotNum
						LEFT JOIN BAS_SKU_MULTIWAREHOUSE bsm WITH(NOLOCK)    
      ON    
      ila.organizationId = bsm.organizationId    
      AND illi.warehouseId = bsm.warehouseId    
      AND ila.customerId = bsm.customerId    
      AND bs.sku = bsm.sku    
      LEFT JOIN BAS_PACKAGE_DETAILS t WITH(NOLOCK)    
      ON    
      ila.organizationId = t.organizationId    
      AND    
      CASE WHEN isnull(bsm.customerId, '') = '' THEN bs.customerId ELSE    
      bsm.customerId END = t.customerId    
      AND    
      CASE WHEN isnull(bsm.packId, '') = '' THEN bs.packId ELSE bsm.packId END =    
      t.packId    
      AND    
      CASE WHEN isnull(bsm.reportUom, '') = '' THEN bs.reportUom ELSE    
      bsm.reportUom END = t.packUom
          WHERE BL.zoneId                              = '02'
               AND ILLI.QTY > 0
                    
            AND DATEDIFF(DAY,   GETDATE(), ISNULL(ILA.lotAtt02, ILA.lotAtt07)) <= 90

            AND BS.sku_group5 IN ( 'C类物资', 'B类物资', '包材', '原料', '辅料', 'A类物资' )
						
         group by CASE WHEN BS.sku_group5 IN ( 'C类物资', 'B类物资' ) THEN
                                          'B、C类物资'
                                     WHEN BS.sku_group5 IN ( '包材', '原料', '辅料' ) THEN
                                       '物料'
                                     ELSE
                                       BS.sku_group5
                                   END , isnull(ILA.lotAtt02, ILA.lotatt07) ,ila.lotAtt06,bs.alternate_sku3,bs.skuDescr1,t.uomDescr

datasets.name: 验收记录异常数据
datasets.sql_template:
select * from (select CONVERT(varchar(10), h.asnCreationTime, 120) AS 订单时间, 
                h.asnNo AS ASN单号, bcm.codeDescr AS 单据类型, 
								bz.zoneDescr AS 库区, b.skuDescr1 AS 物料名称, b.easyCode AS 物料代码, 
								 d.lotAtt04 AS 来厂批号生产批号, d.lotAtt06 AS 自编批号, 
                bcm1.codeDescr AS 质量状态,CONVERT(decimal(18, 3), d.receivedQty) AS 数量, bu.userName AS 库管员, 
								bcm7.codeDescr AS 接收人,bcm8.codeDescr AS 复核人, MAX(CONVERT(VARCHAR(4000), d.noteText)) AS 备注


from   dbo.DOC_ASN_HEADER AS h LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.DOC_ASN_DETAILS AS d ON d.organizationId = h.organizationId AND d.customerId = h.customerId AND 
                d.warehouseId = h.warehouseId AND d.asnNo = h.asnNo LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.BSM_CODE_ML AS bcm ON bcm.organizationId = h.organizationId AND h.asnType = bcm.codeId AND 
                bcm.codeType = 'ASN_TYP' AND bcm.languageId = 'zh_CN' LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.BAS_SKU AS b ON b.organizationId = d.organizationId AND b.sku = d.sku AND 
                b.customerId = d.customerId LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.BSM_CODE_ML AS bcm1 ON bcm1.organizationId = d.organizationId AND d.lotAtt05 = bcm1.codeId AND 
                bcm1.codeType = 'LOT_QISTS' AND bcm1.languageId = 'zh_CN' LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.BSM_USER AS bu ON bu.organizationId = h.organizationId AND d.operator = bu.userId LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.BSM_USER AS bu1 ON bu1.organizationId = h.organizationId AND h.addWho = bu1.userId LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.BSM_CODE_ML AS bcm2 ON bcm2.organizationId = b.organizationId AND b.sku_group5 = bcm2.codeId AND 
                bcm2.codeType = 'SKU_GRP_5' AND bcm2.languageId = 'zh_CN' LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.BSM_CODE_ML AS bcm3 ON bcm3.organizationId = b.organizationId AND b.sku_group4 = bcm3.codeId AND 
                bcm3.codeType = 'SKU_GRP_4' AND bcm3.languageId = 'zh_CN' LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.BSM_CODE_ML AS bcm4 ON bcm4.organizationId = h.organizationId AND h.asnReference5 = bcm4.codeId AND 
                bcm4.codeType = 'DP_TYPE' AND bcm4.languageId = 'zh_CN' LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.BSM_CODE_ML AS bcm7 ON bcm7.organizationId = h.organizationId AND d.note11 = bcm7.codeId AND 
                bcm7.codeType = 'NOTE_2' AND bcm7.languageId = 'zh_CN'  LEFT OUTER JOIN
								dbo.BSM_CODE_ML AS bcm8 ON bcm8.organizationId = h.organizationId AND d.note12 = bcm8.codeId AND 
                bcm8.codeType = 'NOTE_2' AND bcm8.languageId = 'zh_CN' LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.TSK_TASKLISTS AS t ON t.organizationId = d.organizationId AND t.warehouseId = d.warehouseId AND 
                t.docNo = d.asnNo AND t.docLineNo = d.asnLineNo LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.BAS_LOCATION AS bl ON bl.organizationId = t.organizationId AND bl.warehouseId = t.warehouseId AND 
                bl.locationId = t.planToLocation LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.BAS_ZONE AS bz ON bz.organizationId = bl.organizationId AND bz.warehouseId = bl.warehouseId AND 
                bl.zoneId = bz.zoneId LEFT OUTER JOIN
                dbo.BSM_CODE_ML AS bcm5 ON bcm5.organizationId = h.organizationId AND h.issuePartyAddress3 = bcm5.codeId AND
                 bcm5.codeType = 'ZXJT_XM' AND bcm5.languageId = 'zh_CN' LEFT OUTER JOIN
